purpose: Zero-shot semantic coverage curation; scores are proxies, not human ground-truth labels.
source: Fashionpedia test images downloaded from the official CVDF archive

facets.name: modern office
prompts: professional fashion photo inside a modern office

prompts: street-style fashion on an urban sidewalk
person walking on a city street

outfit photographed in a home interior

facets.name: casual
